title: Midnight Nourish Knafeh
description: A creamy, peppery midnight craving dish featuring a nut-free knafeh base served with a drizzle of honey and walnuts.
instructions: Place kanafeh sheets on a baking sheet.
In a medium saucepan, heat heavy cream until just starting to boil.
Reduce heat and stir in sugar and vanilla extract until dissolved.
Pour hot cream mixture evenly over the top of each knafeh sheet, ensuring they are fully coated.
Bake for 10-15 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Gently sprinkle honey and chopped walnuts over warm kanafeh.
Allow to cool slightly before serving.
